decision: Atomic add+commit in git-queue.sh — prevent cross-role staging collisions

steps.action: Atomic add+commit in git-queue.sh — prevent cross-role staging collisions
steps.notes: Two fixes: (1) pass files to git commit to prevent cross-role staging collisions, (2) pre-commit hook blocks bare git commit — all commits must go through git-queue.sh. Commits 61d2f24 + 930a22a. Jeff accepted.
Jeff accepted. Two commits: 61d2f24 (atomic file-scoped commit) + 930a22a (pre-commit hook enforces git-queue). Proving gate met.
